name: iSpring Learn LMS API
what_it_does: iSpring Learn cloud LMS REST API for e-learning content delivery, training management, and learner progress tracking, with iSpring Suite PowerPoint-based authoring tool integration. Enables AI agents to manage course and content catalog management for training program automation, handle learner enrollment and group assignment for automated training delivery, access learning path creation and sequential course assignment for structured training automation, retrieve learner completion and assessment score tracking for compliance reporting automation, manage certificate generation and expiry tracking for certification program automation, handle department and role-based training assignment for organizational training automation, access SCORM and xAPI content hosting and delivery for e-learning content management, retrieve reporting and analytics for training effectiveness automation, manage ILT (instructor-led training) session and attendance tracking for blended learning automation, and integrate iSpring with HRIS platforms (BambooHR, Workday), Zoom, and Salesforce for HR training workflow automation.
use_cases: Onboarding employees from HR training agents
Tracking compliance training from regulatory agents
Certifying staff from certification management agents
Delivering sales training from enablement agents
not_for: Large enterprise LMS with complex workflow (use Cornerstone or Saba)
Customer and partner external training (use Skilljar or Thought Industries)
Academic institution and higher education LMS
best_when: A small to mid-market business (50-2,000 employees) wanting AI agents to automate employee training delivery, onboarding programs, compliance tracking, and certification management within iSpring Learn, especially for organizations using PowerPoint-based content authoring.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE TRAINING COMPLETION AS REGULATORY EVIDENCE: Automated compliance training completion tracking in iSpring Learn for regulated industries (OSHA, HIPAA, financial services) must capture completion with passing score and timestamp; automated compliance reporting using LMS completion records without proctored assessment may not satisfy regulator audit requirements. SCORM VERSION COMPATIBILITY WITH LEGACY CONTENT: Automated SCORM content upload and delivery in iSpring must verify SCORM version (1.2 vs 2004) compatibility with both the content package and iSpring LMS runtime; SCORM version mismatch creates content launch failure and completion tracking gaps. GDPR EU LEARNER DATA PROCESSING: Automated learner data collection and completion tracking for EU employees requires GDPR-compliant data processing disclosure; iSpring data residency is primarily US; verify EU data residency availability before automated EU employee training deployment.

auth.notes: iSpring uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Yoshkar-Ola, Mari El Republic, Russia HQ (iSpring Solutions). Founded 2001 by Yury Uskov. Private. US sales office in Alexandria, Virginia. 60,000+ customers in 155 countries. PowerPoint authoring heritage with iSpring Suite desktop tool. Cloud LMS: iSpring Learn. Compliance, safety, and employee training focus. Competes with TalentLMS, LearnUpon, and 360Learning for SMB and mid-market LMS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user annual subscription with volume tiers
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-active-user annual subscription; iSpring Learn LMS and iSpring Suite authoring tool sold separately or bundled; volume pricing for 100+ users
pricing.notes: Yoshkar-Ola Russia / US office Alexandria VA. Private. Founded 2001. 60,000+ customers. PowerPoint authoring + cloud LMS. Per-user annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; content upload and report generation throttled; no webhooks — polling required

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — ALL COMPLETION EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: iSpring Learn does not support native webhooks; automated training completion detection, certificate generation triggers, and HRIS sync require scheduled polling; design polling interval appropriate to training volume and compliance urgency

RUSSIA HQ GEOPOLITICAL DATA SOVEREIGNTY CONSIDERATION: iSpring Solutions is headquartered in Russia with US/EU data centers; organizations with data sovereignty requirements (US federal, defense contractors, GDPR-sensitive sectors) should verify data residency configuration and conduct vendor risk assessment before automated employee data processing

SCORM 1.2 VS 2004 COMPLETION STATUS FIELD DIFFERENCE: SCORM 1.2 uses cmi.core.lesson_status ('passed', 'failed', 'completed') while SCORM 2004 uses cmi.completion_status and cmi.success_status separately; automated completion tracking must handle both SCORM versions for mixed content libraries; unified completion report requires version-aware status field mapping

Certificate expiry re-enrollment automation — iSpring certificate expiry tracking requires automated re-enrollment workflow for recurring compliance training; implement expiry date monitoring and re-enrollment trigger before expiry to maintain continuous compliance coverage; expired certification gap creates regulatory compliance hole

Group and department enrollment inheritance — automated enrollment in iSpring group-based training propagates to all group members; automated group membership changes (HRIS sync) trigger training enrollment/unenrollment; validate group membership sync logic before automated HRIS-iSpring group sync to prevent unintended training assignment

Bulk user provisioning from HRIS — automated user provisioning from BambooHR, Workday, or ADP via iSpring REST API has per-request user creation limits; bulk new-hire onboarding (>50 users) requires batched API calls with rate limit awareness; implement provisioning queue for large onboarding cohorts
agent_readiness.security_notes: SMB LMS. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US/EU data centers. Russia HQ — evaluate geopolitical data sovereignty. Employee training and completion data.

security_score_components.security_notes: SMB LMS. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US/EU. Russia HQ geopolitical risk. Employee training and completion data.
